document.title: Language Translation Procedures (Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector)

sourceSummary.oneLine: Internal procedure A-TCF-5-020 defines translation management for HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC user manuals.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to manage customer-requested local language user manual translation, review, approval, distribution, delivery, and record retention.
keyPoints: Scope applies to HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC User Manual translation procedure.
Development is responsible for translating the User Manual on customer demand and may request an outside professional translation if necessary.
Development Head Manager reviews internally and requests approval from the Quality Control Head Manager.
Quality Control Head Manager gives final approval and distributes data to related departments.
Overseas Sales Department informs customers about the translated manual.
Records are maintained by Development with 3 years storage time and 5 years possession time.

evidence.claim: The work procedure includes customer request, person-in-charge appointment, third-party translation, contract signing, translation, correction and supervision, completion, and customer delivery.
evidence.evidenceText: 1. Customer request 2. Appointment of person in charge 3. Commissioned as a translation specialists 4. Signing a contract 5. Translation progress 6. Correction and supervision 7. Translation complete 8. Customer delivery

evidence.claim: Translated manuals are modified and reviewed, and translation problems are corrected again.
evidence.evidenceText: Modify and review the translated manual. If there is a problem with the translation, correct it again.
